# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 291

Any reference in this code to the Department of Public Works shall be deemed to refer to the Department of Transportation, which is part of the Business, Transportation and Housing Agency as provided by Section 13975 of the Government Code.

*(Amended by Stats. 1982, Ch. 454, Sec. 178.)*

subsections.text: Any reference in this code to the Department of Public Works shall be deemed to refer to the Department of Transportation, which is part of the Business, Transportation and Housing Agency as provided by Section 13975 of the Government Code.
